meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Scale Your SaaS Projects Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project scaling. Learn how to master freelance pitching using Antigravity and Claude Code in this advanced developer case study.
content.answer_block: To break the scaling ceiling, pivot from manual labor to high-leverage freelance pitching. By automating your technical discovery phase using Antigravity and Claude Code, you can generate comprehensive, production-ready project architectures in minutes, allowing you to pitch high-ticket SaaS solutions without burning out on discovery calls.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your inbox is flooded with low-quality leads, and your current project pipeline feels like a stagnant swamp. You're trapped in the 'manual labor' cycle, trading hours for dollars while your ability to take on high-value clients remains locked behind the wall of endless discovery documentation.

The secret isn't working harder; it's shifting your freelance pitching strategy to a productized, AI-driven model. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can transform a 10-hour discovery process into a 15-minute high-fidelity proposal that wins clients instantly.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Before writing code, use AI to extract the core business value from your client's messy requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided client requirement document. Extract the core MVP features, define the success metrics, and suggest a high-level technical architecture that prioritizes speed-to-market.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Summarize the technical feasibility of the provided requirements and output a JSON schema for the project roadmap.'

steps.title: Generate Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Create a robust boilerplate that handles auth, database, and API routing, ensuring a professional foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js 14 boilerplate with Prisma ORM, Auth.js, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure folder structure follows DDD patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file ./src/app/page.tsx --content 'Initialize base layout with modular components.'

steps.title: Automate Database Schema Design
steps.description: Convert client user stories into an efficient, relational database model without manual SQL drafting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the project requirements, create a Prisma schema file including User, Project, and Payment models with proper indexing and relations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npx prisma format && npx prisma migrate dev --name init_schema'

steps.title: Construct the Pitch Deck Assets
steps.description: Generate technical documentation that you can include in your pitch to show authority.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a technical proposal document explaining the chosen stack, security measures, and scalability plan based on the generated architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file ./PROPOSAL.md --content 'Draft technical overview for the client.'

steps.title: Iterative Refinement and Review
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit the generated codebase for common security and performance bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the generated code. Identify potential SQL injection risks or auth vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and suggest 3 optimizations for performance.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Cost of Inaction' section in your pitch deck to justify your premium pricing.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your boilerplate; it proves reliability to non-technical clients.
Keep your Antigravity prompts modular; create a library of 'system prompts' for different project types.
Never send a raw codebase; use the CLI tools to generate a clean, summarized 'Project Blueprint' PDF.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' history to show the client the exact development velocity you achieved during the discovery phase.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, package your boilerplate as a private repository template and start pitching to your next high-ticket lead using the generated proposal.
content.conversion_block: Stop chasing low-paying gigs and start building a high-leverage freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
